channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 155 LINDEN BOULEVARD, Apt B6, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE HINGES AT DOOR AT ENTRANCE AT EAST SECTION LOCATED AT CELLAR APT B6, 1st CELLAR APT FROM NORTH AT EAST , SECTION ''730 ROGERS''

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2588 7 AVENUE, Apt 1C, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD-PAINT THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE AND EITHER TESTED INCONCLUSIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AT 0.5MG/CM2 OR TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT ON A METAL OR CERAMIC SUBSTRATE AS SET FORTH IN (28 RCNY §11-07(b)) USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(b)(2). 1st CLOSET FROM EAST AT SOUTH WALL DOOR IN THE 3rd ROOM FROM EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2588 7 AVENUE, Apt 1C, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD - PAINT THAT TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AND THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE - USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(B)(2) 1st CLOSET FROM EAST AT SOUTH WALL DOOR FRAME IN THE 3rd ROOM FROM EAST AT SOUTH LOCATED AT APT 1C, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''BUILDING2''

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2588 7 AVENUE, Apt 1C, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD - PAINT THAT TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AND THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE - USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(B)(2) 1st CLOSET FROM EAST AT SOUTH WALL DOOR, 1st CLOSET FROM EAST AT SOUTH WALL DOOR FRAME IN THE 3rd ROOM FROM EAST AT NORTH LOCATED AT APT 1C, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST ,

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2588 7 AVENUE, Apt 1C, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD - PAINT THAT TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AND THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE - USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(B)(2) 1st DOOR FROM SOUTH AT WEST WALL, 1st DOOR FRAME FROM SOUTH AT WEST WALL IN THE KITCHEN LOCATED AT APT 1C, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''BUILDING2''

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 392 ROCKAWAY PARKWAY, Apt 2R, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE SPRINGS BALANCES AT LOWER WINDOW SASH AT SOUTH WALL IN THE 1st ROOM FROM EAST LOCATED AT APT 2R, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 392 ROCKAWAY PARKWAY, Apt 2R, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE REPAIR THE ROOF SO THAT IT WILL NOT LEAK AT CEILING IN THE 1st ROOM FROM EAST LOCATED AT APT 2R, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1459 WYTHE PLACE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE PROPERLY REPAIR WITH SIMILAR MATERIAL THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE FIRE RETARDANT MATERIAL AT CEILING AND WEST WALL NORTH TO SOUTH AT PUBLIC HALL, 6th STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1459 WYTHE PLACE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE REPAIR THE ROOF SO THAT IT WILL NOT LEAK AT CEILING AT PUBLIC HALL, 6th STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 220 WEST 149 STREET, Apt 34, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2031 ADM CODE PROVIDE HOT WATER AT ALL HOT WATER FIXTURES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 34, 3rd STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2026 ADM CODE REPAIR THE LEAKY AND/OR DEFECTIVE FAUCETS AT BATHTUB IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 5C, 5th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.description:

§ 27-2033 ADM CODE PROVIDE READY ACCESS TO BUILDINGS HEATING SYSTEM DOOR LOCKED AT BOILER ROOM

item.description:

§ 27-2070 ADM CODE PROVIDE AN ADEQUATE SUPPLY OF GAS TO THE FIXTURES AT STOVE IN THE KITCHEN LOCATED AT APT 1E, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE & 309 M/D LAW ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF KEY OPERATED LOCK INSTALLED AT DOOR TO ROOM WITH FIRE ESCAPE WINDOW IN THE 1st ROOM FROM NORTH LOCATED AT APT 3, 1st STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 55 EAST 210 STREET, Apt 4D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF ROACHES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 4D, 4th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 55 EAST 210 STREET, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
567 (C) § 27-2017, 27-2017.1, 27-2017.4, 27-2017.5, 27-2017.8, 27-2019, 27-2021 HMC: ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF EVIDENCE OF RATS AND ALL UNDERLYING CAUSES CREATING THE PEST INFESTATIONS, BY USING INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT (IPM), ELIMINATE ALL BURROW ENTRY AND PASSAGEWAYS, PEST NESTS, HOLES, GAPS OR CRACKS IN WALLS, CEILINGS, FLOORS, FIXING LEAKS AND MANAGING GARBAGE IN PUBLIC AREAS. EVIDENC

§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE 2 LITES AT 1ST WINDOW FROM SOUTH AT WEST WALL CREATING CUT HAZARD AT PUBLIC HALL, 6th STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 3357 PERRY AVENUE, Apt 2, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE & 309 M/D LAW ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF HOT WATER TEMP EXCEEDING THE MAXIMUM AMOUNT OF 130 AT PLUMBING FIXTURES AT KITCHEN AND BATHROOM IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 2, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.description:

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 3961 CARPENTER AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 2007 ADM CODE REMOVE THE ILLEGAL FASTENING CONSISTING OF PANIC BAR INSTALLED AT ROOF DOOR ( B STAIR ) THAT DOSE NOT ALLOW RE-ENTRY FROM ROOF TO PUBLIC HALL AT BULKHEAD , 6th STORY

item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF MICE IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 2B, 2nd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 3357 PERRY AVENUE, Apt 1, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE GLASS AT LOWER WINDOW SHASH CREATING CUT HAZARD AT 2ND WINDOW FROM SOUTH AT WEST IN THE 2nd ROOM FROM EAST LOCATED AT APT 1, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 47-05 44 STREET, Apt D2, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2043.1 HMC INSTALL THE MISSING OR REPAIR/REPLACE THE DEFECTIVE WINDOW GUARD(S) IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE SPECIFICATIONS OF THE NEW YORK CITY HEALTH CODE SECTION 24 RCNY CHAPTER 12. WG TO INSTALL = 10; WG TO REPLACE = 0; WG TO REPAIR = 0; IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT D2, 4th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 73-12 35 AVENUE, Apt E05, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.4 ADM CODE- CORRECT FAILURE TO NOTIFY OCCUPANTS AND/OR TO INVESTIGATE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARDS.

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 73-12 35 AVENUE, Apt E05, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.7 ADM CODE: CORRECT FAILURE TO PROVIDE TO THE DEPARTMENT WITHIN 45 DAYS OF DEMAND ALL RECORDS REQUIRED TO BE MAINTAINED BY OWNER PURSUANT TO LOCAL LAW 1 OF 2004 RELATED TO LEAD-BASED PAINT NOTICES, INSPECTIONS AND REMEDIATION/ABATEMENT ACTIVITIES.
